calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-17-300758 In Re: Establish Fact of Death of Jau-Inn Huang and PES-17-300759 In Re: Establish Fact of Death of Yu-Hua Chu.

Appearances: Jason Haycock for and with Joyce Huang (Petitioner).

Mr. Haycock stated that the parties had no will, that there was some real property that was already in Ms. Huang's name (placed in her name prior to disappearance) and that his Client is not aware of any other assets. Ms. Huang stated that she is not aware of any other assets, that she assumes there were some bank accounts, that she highly doubts they exceeded $150,000.00 for each of her Parents, that she was not aware of the parties having left anything significant and that they lived light. The Court granted both Petitions to Establish Fact of Death (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To May-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
